mundaneGear.name: First-Aid Kit
mundaneGear.effect: +2 dice to mundane injury care (not a Physician's Gifts)

mundaneGear.name: Crowbar
mundaneGear.effect: +2 dice forcing something open; usable as an improvised weapon

mundaneGear.name: Backpack
mundaneGear.effect: A container for other Small/Tiny gear

mundaneGear.name: Mundane Disguise Kit
mundaneGear.effect: +2 dice to Subterfuge passing as someone else, no Gift involved

classicClownProps.name: Clown Shoes
classicClownProps.effect: +1 die to Acrobatics for falls/dodges; -1 die to Stealth

classicClownProps.name: Bottomless Case
classicClownProps.effect: Wit + Scholarship to "produce" a small needed item, once per Act

classicClownProps.name: Squirting Flower
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: pressurized jet, minor damage + brief stun. Bit: a silly soaking. Recharges in the Backstage

classicClownProps.name: Cream Pie
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: strips 1 Laughter from the target. Bit: the classic pie in the face

classicClownProps.name: Rubber Chicken
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: a startling smack, brief stun. Bit: the oldest prop in the book

classicClownProps.name: Confetti Cannon
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: blinds/distracts a small area. Bit: a party popper

classicClownProps.name: Unicycle
classicClownProps.effect: +1 die to Acrobatics while riding; faster than walking

classicClownProps.name: Whoopee Cushion
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: a burst of noise breaks a target's concentration. Bit: exactly what it looks like

classicClownProps.name: Squeaky Mallet
classicClownProps.effect: Turn: a solid hit that ignores soak. Bit: a squeak-toy mallet

troupeGear.name: Signet Ring of the Ring
troupeGear.effect: +1 die to Persuasion when giving a direct order

troupeGear.name: Lucky Horseshoe
troupeGear.effect: Once per session, reroll a single die on a Flop result

troupeGear.name: Smoke Mask
troupeGear.effect: +2 dice to Subterfuge or Acrobatics fleeing an authority figure

troupeGear.name: The Bindle
troupeGear.effect: Once per session, produce a plausible small mundane item for free

troupeGear.name: Contract Badge
troupeGear.effect: +1 die to Persuasion in professional or mortal business contexts

legendaryGear.note: Not bought at any price — a fragment of a historic Motley, a prop that belonged to a Ring Legend. These enter play only through story: found, earned, or handed down.
